reason: Industry crossing. Excellent quality habitat supporting all life stages of WCT. Currently scores as passable but likely to be replaced soon. Monitor.
notes: Pure population of WCT confirmed in Lodgepole Creek. Undersized culvert with signs of overtopping. Culvert not buried in road bed, leading to damage in several locations.  Debris jam with 0.75 m drip currently creating a temporary passage barrier.
supporting_links: https://www.newgraphenvironment.com/fish_passage_elk_2021_reporting/appendix---197787-197786---lodgepole-creek.html Also see: VAST. 2023. Elk River Westslope Cutthroat Trout passage and habitat investigations. Prepared for Canadian Wildlife Federation by VAST Resource Solutions Inc., Cranbrook, B.C.
pscis_assessment_comment: Small stream with good flow.  Abundant gravels just upstream with gradients increasing to 6-7% near 540m upstream of culvert where large (~30m high) waterfall is located. 10:18
